description: Admin boundary lines layer. Derived from admin boundary polygons; may not be present for all countries. Schema is not yet fully standardised across countries.

fields.name: adm_level
fields.description: Admin level this boundary segment represents.

fields.name: valid_on
fields.description: Timestamp (with timezone) when this version of the data was last updated.

fields.name: valid_to
fields.description: Timestamp when this version was superseded; null if this is the current version.

fields.name: right_pcod
fields.description: P-code of the administrative unit to the right of the boundary line.

fields.name: left_pcod
fields.description: P-code of the administrative unit to the left of the boundary line.
